name: auto-keys

inputs.name: targets
inputs.description: [AutoKeysCycler.Target] — list of (pid, AutoKeysSequence, label?) for the running windows to cycle over.

inputs.name: loopDelay
inputs.description: Seconds to sleep between full cycle iterations (after the last target's last step).

inputs.name: safetyConfig
inputs.description: AutoKeysSafetyConfig — kill-key combo (keyCode + modifiers), gesture (.holdFor(seconds) | .doubleTap(within)), resumeGrace. Defaults to .default.

outputs.name: progress
outputs.description: ProgressCallback (current: String?, next: String?, currentKeyCode: CGKeyCode?) fired per-step for UI mirroring.

outputs.name: engagementEvents
outputs.description: AsyncStream<EngagementEvent> from AutoKeysSafetyMonitor — .userEngaged / .killRequested for kill-key-as-toggle wiring.

summary: macOS auto-keys cycler — focus-then-fire serial keystroke driver across multiple windowed apps. Engine + UI + tests + ADR, captured for the Windows / WPF sibling port.
